name: God demands that man should submit, without reservation, the whole of his being to
introduction:
His will. Man's outlook, intellectual pursuits, behaviour, interaction with other people and
modes of endeavour should all be completely subordinate to Islam. God does not accept the
splitting up of human life into separate compartments, some governed by the teachings of
Islam and others exempt.
